title: More Nonsense Limerick 41
content:
There was an old person of Florence,
    Who held mutton chops in abhorrence;
    He purchased a Bustard, 
    And fried him in Mustard,
    Which choked that old person of Florence.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 41"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
